sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 111:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 111:1
items.html: Hesed and Gevura are not the self of the light of Hesed, but illuminations of Hochma and Bina that reached Hesed when it clothed in the vessel of Bina. But Tifferet is the self and essence of the light of Hesed. (Inner Light, Item‎ 41)
